basic_details.job_title: ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 50 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI), a statutory body set up by an Act of Parliament in 1949
basic_details.short_information: This table summarizes the essential facts of the ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 notification, before candidates move on to eligibility, exam pattern, and application details.

application_fee.details: ICAI has fixed a single, non-refundable application fee for this recruitment, payable only through the online portal at the time of applying. Candidates should note that an incomplete payment will not count as a complete application. | Application fee: Rs. 500 (Non-refundable), inclusive of all applicable taxes. The application is treated as complete only after submission of all required details and successful payment of the fee. Incomplete applications are liable to be rejected.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for the Executive Officer post is 25 years, as on 30.06.2026. The notification does not mention any age relaxation for reserved categories.

qualification.details: The core eligibility requirement for this post is holding the Chartered Accountant qualification, with no prior work experience mandated. However, ICAI has also listed a set of desirable skills that candidates are expected to bring to the role. | Qualification: Chartered Accountant. Experience: Not essential - freshers are eligible to apply. | Desirable skill sets mentioned in the notification include: | In-depth knowledge of Accounting, Auditing, Financial Reporting, Direct and Indirect Tax laws, and related laws. Research and drafting ability for technical papers, policy notes, and standards. Analytical and review skills for compliance and regulatory evaluation. Effective communication, presentation, and stakeholder coordination. Proficiency in MS Office, ERP/accounting systems, and digital learning tools. A research-oriented mindset with the ability to prepare concept notes and discussion papers on evolving tax issues. Basic understanding of coding and programming languages. Familiarity with financial markets, investor protection laws, securities regulations (SEBI, RBI, etc.), and financial literacy initiatives.

vacancy_details.Location: Initial posting at Delhi/Noida; liable to be transferred anywhere in India

post_wise_breakdown.location: Initial posting at Delhi/Noida; liable to be transferred anywhere in India

salary_details.details: The Executive Officer post carries a well-defined government-style pay scale under Pay Level 10, along with several allowances and retirement benefits. Here are the confirmed compensation details from the notification. | Pay Level 10 - Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100 to Rs. 1,77,500. Initial total compensation is approximately Rs. 15.68 lakhs per annum. Compensation consists of Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Transport Allowance, and the National Pension System (NPS). Additional benefits include Ex-Gratia for academic pursuit, Leave Travel Concession (LTC), Gratuity, and other benefits as per service conditions.

selection_process: Mode of Examination Computer Based Test (CBT)
Question Paper Type Multiple Choice Questions (MCQ) + Descriptive
General Section – Part A (MCQ) 30 Questions, 30 Marks
General Section – Part B (Descriptive) 2 Questions, 30 Marks
Marking Scheme MCQs: 1 mark each; Descriptive Questions: 15 marks each
Negative Marking MCQ: 0.25 marks deducted for each wrong answer; Descriptive: not applicable
Selection for the Executive Officer post is based on a Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by a personal interview
with a fixed structure of MCQ and descriptive questions across two sections. Here is the detailed exam pattern as given in the notification.
candidates can select their preferred test centre through the online portal
but the final allotment is based on seat availability and preference
and no request for change of centre will be entertained. The final selection is based on combined performance in the written test and the interview.

syllabus.details: The syllabus is divided into a General Section and a Technical Section, covering both aptitude-based and CA-domain-specific topics. | Part A (MCQ): | General Awareness Logical Reasoning Quantitative Aptitude English Language & Comprehension | Part B (Descriptive): | Drafting of Official Letters / Memos / Office Notes / Reports | Accounting Standards Advanced Auditing, Assurance and Professional Ethics Financial Reporting Corporate and Other Laws Financial Management and Strategic Management Direct Tax Laws and International Taxation Indirect Tax Laws Information Systems

how_to_apply: Applications for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online only; applications received by post, by hand, by email, or through any other mode will not be accepted. Here are the steps to apply.
Ensure you fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for the post before starting the online application.
Fill the online application form as per the instructions contained in it.
Upload all required documents in the prescribed format at the time of submission.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 500 online through the portal; the application is complete only after successful payment.
Submit the application on or before 31 July 2026; late submissions will not be considered.
Take a printout of the submitted online form for your own records.

The specific URL/link for the online application portal is not detailed within the extracted text of this notification beyond an "Apply Here" reference; candidates should check the official ICAI website for the live application link.
important_instructions: ICAI has laid out several general conditions governing this recruitment, covering everything from communication requirements to post-selection probation. Candidates should be aware of the following before applying.

Candidates must keep their registered email address and mobile number active, as all communication will be sent only to these; ICAI is not responsible for any non-communication due to invalid details. Submitting incomplete or false information, or suppressing facts, can lead to rejection of candidature and debarment from future employment at ICAI, besides legal proceedings. Mere possession of the minimum eligibility criteria does not entitle a candidate to be called for the next stage or selected for the post. Candidature remains provisional even after successful completion of the process, until the genuineness of academic and experience documents is verified. Outstation candidates attending the interview will be reimbursed travel expenses by the shortest route, as per ICAI's rules. Candidates may be required to disclose pending criminal cases, and ICAI may conduct independent antecedent verification, including police records. Selected candidates will be on probation for one year, which may be extended for non-satisfactory performance. Selected candidates will be posted at any office of the Institute across the country and are liable to be transferred anywhere in India. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Any notification or corrigendum related to this recruitment will be published only on the ICAI website.

content_sections.heading: ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview
content_sections.text: This table summarizes the essential facts of the ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 notification, before candidates move on to eligibility, exam pattern, and application details.

rows.information: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI), a statutory body set up by an Act of Parliament in 1949

content_sections.heading: ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates need to track three key dates for this recruitment - the opening and closing of online applications, and the written test date, which ICAI has reserved the right to reschedule if needed. ICAI reserves the right to revise, modify, or reschedule the date of the written test if considered necessary.

content_sections.heading: ICAI Executive Officer Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: ICAI has advertised a single post under this notification, with all 50 vacancies open to Chartered Accountants regardless of prior work experience. There is no category-wise reservation breakdown mentioned in the notification. ICAI reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of vacancies as per its requirement, or even cancel the whole recruitment process without assigning any reason.

rows.location: Initial posting at Delhi/Noida; liable to be transferred anywhere in India

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria and Desirable Skill Sets
content_sections.text: The core eligibility requirement for this post is holding the Chartered Accountant qualification, with no prior work experience mandated. However, ICAI has also listed a set of desirable skills that candidates are expected to bring to the role. Qualification: Chartered Accountant. Experience: Not essential - freshers are eligible to apply. Desirable skill sets mentioned in the notification include: In-depth knowledge of Accounting, Auditing, Financial Reporting, Direct and Indirect Tax laws, and related laws. Research and drafting ability for technical papers, policy notes, and standards. Analytical and review skills for compliance and regulatory evaluation. Effective communication, presentation, and stakeholder coordination. Proficiency in MS Office, ERP/accounting systems, and digital learning tools. A research-oriented mindset with the ability to prepare concept notes and discussion papers on evolving tax issues. Basic understanding of coding and programming languages. Familiarity with financial markets, investor protection laws, securities regulations (SEBI, RBI, etc.), and financial literacy initiatives.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for the Executive Officer post is 25 years, as on 30.06.2026 . The notification does not mention any age relaxation for reserved categories.

content_sections.heading: Job Profile and Key Responsibilities
content_sections.text: The Executive Officer role is designed to support ICAI's committees, boards, and departments across accounting, auditing, taxation, corporate laws, and financial reporting functions. The specific duties assigned depend on the department the candidate is placed in after joining, and may include any combination of the following broad responsibility areas. Technical Research, Standards & Guidance: Drafting and reviewing Accounting Standards, Standards on Auditing, Valuation Standards, and preparing technical notes, exposure drafts, and impact assessments of regulatory changes. Taxation & Policy Advisory: Working on Direct Taxation, GST, International Taxation, and corporate restructuring matters, including representations before CBDT, CBIC, and the Ministry of Finance. Review & Oversight: Reviewing financial statements, audit reports, and disclosures for compliance with AS/Ind AS, SAs, CARO, and the Companies Act, along with Peer Review and Quality Review processes. Advisory & Disciplinary Functions: Drafting opinions on accounting, auditing, taxation, and ethics issues, and supporting the Disciplinary Directorate in case reviews and investigations. Capacity Building, Training & Knowledge Dissemination: Developing certificate courses, webinars, e-learning modules, and investor awareness programs with bodies like SEBI and stock exchanges. Administrative Support: Preparing agendas and minutes for committee meetings, handling budgeting and vendor coordination, and supporting IT initiatives and examination management. The notification clarifies that these responsibilities are indicative only, and the specific profile and duties of each incumbent will be determined after joining.

content_sections.heading: Salary and Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The Executive Officer post carries a well-defined government-style pay scale under Pay Level 10, along with several allowances and retirement benefits. Here are the confirmed compensation details from the notification. Pay Level 10 - Basic Pay of Rs. 56,100 to Rs. 1,77,500 . Initial total compensation is approximately Rs. 15.68 lakhs per annum . Compensation consists of Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Transport Allowance, and the National Pension System (NPS). Additional benefits include Ex-Gratia for academic pursuit, Leave Travel Concession (LTC), Gratuity, and other benefits as per service conditions.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: ICAI has fixed a single, non-refundable application fee for this recruitment, payable only through the online portal at the time of applying. Candidates should note that an incomplete payment will not count as a complete application. Application fee: Rs. 500 (Non-refundable) , inclusive of all applicable taxes. The application is treated as complete only after submission of all required details and successful payment of the fee . Incomplete applications are liable to be rejected.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process and Exam Pattern
content_sections.text: Selection for the Executive Officer post is based on a Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by a personal interview, with a fixed structure of MCQ and descriptive questions across two sections. Here is the detailed exam pattern as given in the notification. For centre allotment, candidates can select their preferred test centre through the online portal, but the final allotment is based on seat availability and preference, and no request for change of centre will be entertained. The final selection is based on combined performance in the written test and the interview.

rows.details: MCQs: 1 mark each; Descriptive Questions: 15 marks each
MCQ: 0.25 marks deducted for each wrong answer; Descriptive: not applicable

content_sections.heading: CBT Syllabus for ICAI Executive Officer
content_sections.text: The syllabus is divided into a General Section and a Technical Section, covering both aptitude-based and CA-domain-specific topics. Part A (MCQ): General Awareness Logical Reasoning Quantitative Aptitude English Language & Comprehension Part B (Descriptive): Drafting of Official Letters / Memos / Office Notes / Reports Accounting Standards Advanced Auditing, Assurance and Professional Ethics Financial Reporting Corporate and Other Laws Financial Management and Strategic Management Direct Tax Laws and International Taxation Indirect Tax Laws Information Systems

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload all required documents in the prescribed format at the time of submitting the online application, since incomplete or illegible submissions can lead to rejection at any stage. Original documents will be required separately at the interview stage. All documents required for the online application, uploaded in the prescribed format. Original documents related to academic qualification and experience, for verification at the time of interview. No Objection Certificate (NOC), mandatory for candidates currently employed in Central/State Government, Public Sector Enterprises, or Autonomous Bodies, to be produced at the time of interview. Candidates are advised to take a printout of their online application form for their own reference, but are requested not to send a hard copy of the application, CV, or certificates to the Institute.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online only; applications received by post, by hand, by email, or through any other mode will not be accepted. Here are the steps to apply. Ensure you fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for the post before starting the online application. Fill the online application form as per the instructions contained in it. Upload all required documents in the prescribed format at the time of submission. Pay the application fee of Rs. 500 online through the portal; the application is complete only after successful payment. Submit the application on or before 31 July 2026 ; late submissions will not be considered. Take a printout of the submitted online form for your own records. The specific URL/link for the online application portal is not detailed within the extracted text of this notification beyond an "Apply Here" reference; candidates should check the official ICAI website for the live application link.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions and Service Conditions
content_sections.text: ICAI has laid out several general conditions governing this recruitment, covering everything from communication requirements to post-selection probation. Candidates should be aware of the following before applying. Candidates must keep their registered email address and mobile number active, as all communication will be sent only to these; ICAI is not responsible for any non-communication due to invalid details. Submitting incomplete or false information, or suppressing facts, can lead to rejection of candidature and debarment from future employment at ICAI, besides legal proceedings. Mere possession of the minimum eligibility criteria does not entitle a candidate to be called for the next stage or selected for the post. Candidature remains provisional even after successful completion of the process, until the genuineness of academic and experience documents is verified. Outstation candidates attending the interview will be reimbursed travel expenses by the shortest route, as per ICAI's rules. Candidates may be required to disclose pending criminal cases, and ICAI may conduct independent antecedent verification, including police records. Selected candidates will be on probation for one year , which may be extended for non-satisfactory performance. Selected candidates will be posted at any office of the Institute across the country and are liable to be transferred anywhere in India. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Any notification or corrigendum related to this recruitment will be published only on the ICAI website.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online submission is 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there for ICAI Executive Officer 2026?
faq.answer: There are 50 vacancies for the post of Executive Officer (Post Code 2609).

faq.question: Q3. Can a fresher Chartered Accountant apply for this ICAI recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the notification explicitly states that experience is not essential, so freshers can apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ICAI Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 25 years as on 30.06.2026; no age relaxation is mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for ICAI Executive Officer?
faq.answer: The post carries Pay Level 10 (Basic Pay Rs. 56,100–1,77,500), with an initial total compensation of approximately Rs. 15.68 lakhs per annum, including DA, HRA, Transport Allowance, and NPS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500, non-refundable, inclusive of all applicable taxes, payable online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the exam pattern for ICAI Executive Officer?
faq.answer: The exam is a Computer Based Test (CBT) of 150 marks and 150 minutes, with a General Section (MCQ + Descriptive) and a Technical Section (90 MCQs), followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there negative marking in the ICAI Executive Officer exam?
faq.answer: Yes, 0.25 marks are deducted for each wrong MCQ answer; there is no negative marking for descriptive questions.

faq.question: Q9. When is the written test for ICAI Executive Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The written test is scheduled for 16 August 2026, though ICAI reserves the right to reschedule it if necessary.

faq.question: Q10. Will selected candidates be transferable across India?
faq.answer: Yes, the initial posting is at Delhi/Noida, but selected candidates are liable to be transferred anywhere in India as per ICAI's manpower requirements.
